# Atlia

## What Atlia Is

Atlia is the first AI-native property management company for short-term rentals. We give each property a brain so it operates on its own behalf. We're not a tool or a dashboard — we are the property management company. Backed by Y Combinator.

Atlia manages your short-term rental end to end — bookings, guests, pricing, and operations across Airbnb, Vrbo, and beyond — for a 10% fee. That's less than half the 20–30% traditional property managers charge, saving owners thousands of dollars every year.

## Who Atlia Is Built For

- **Short-term rental owners** — anyone renting out a residential property on Airbnb, Vrbo, or similar platforms who wants it managed end to end for a lower fee
- **Long-term rental owners** — most long-term rentals can be converted into more profitable short-term rentals under Atlia's model

## What Atlia Does

- **Runs your property end to end**: bookings, guest communication, dynamic pricing, and day-to-day operations
- **Gives each property a brain**: every property operates on its own behalf, managing itself
- **Charges a 10% fee**: less than half what traditional managers charge

## Where Atlia Is Going

Atlia's long-term vision is to bring traditionally inanimate businesses to life — a property that manages itself, a factory that optimizes its own operations. We see a future where every business is given a brain to operate on its own behalf, and we're starting with property management, a field we know and understand well.

## Company

- **Founded:** 2026 (Y Combinator S26)
- **Backed by:** Y Combinator
- **Contact:** founders@atlia.com
- **Website:** https://www.atlia.com
